AttachInstances.name: AttachInstances
AttachInstances.description: Grants permission to attach one or more EC2 instances to the specified Auto Scaling group

AttachLoadBalancerTargetGroups.name: AttachLoadBalancerTargetGroups
AttachLoadBalancerTargetGroups.description: Grants permission to attach one or more target groups to the specified Auto Scaling group

AttachLoadBalancers.name: AttachLoadBalancers
AttachLoadBalancers.description: Grants permission to attach one or more load balancers to the specified Auto Scaling group

AttachTrafficSources.name: AttachTrafficSources
AttachTrafficSources.description: Grants permission to attach one or more traffic sources to an Auto Scaling group

BatchDeleteScheduledAction.name: BatchDeleteScheduledAction
BatchDeleteScheduledAction.description: Grants permission to delete the specified scheduled actions

BatchPutScheduledUpdateGroupAction.name: BatchPutScheduledUpdateGroupAction
BatchPutScheduledUpdateGroupAction.description: Grants permission to create or update multiple scheduled scaling actions for an Auto Scaling group

CancelInstanceRefresh.name: CancelInstanceRefresh
CancelInstanceRefresh.description: Grants permission to cancel an instance refresh operation in progress

CompleteLifecycleAction.name: CompleteLifecycleAction
CompleteLifecycleAction.description: Grants permission to complete the lifecycle action for the specified token or instance with the specified result

CreateAutoScalingGroup.name: CreateAutoScalingGroup
CreateAutoScalingGroup.description: Grants permission to create an Auto Scaling group with the specified name and attributes

CreateLaunchConfiguration.name: CreateLaunchConfiguration
CreateLaunchConfiguration.description: Grants permission to create a launch configuration

CreateOrUpdateTags.name: CreateOrUpdateTags
CreateOrUpdateTags.description: Grants permission to create or update tags for the specified Auto Scaling group

DeleteAutoScalingGroup.name: DeleteAutoScalingGroup
DeleteAutoScalingGroup.description: Grants permission to delete the specified Auto Scaling group

DeleteLaunchConfiguration.name: DeleteLaunchConfiguration
DeleteLaunchConfiguration.description: Grants permission to delete the specified launch configuration

DeleteLifecycleHook.name: DeleteLifecycleHook
DeleteLifecycleHook.description: Grants permission to deletes the specified lifecycle hook

DeleteNotificationConfiguration.name: DeleteNotificationConfiguration
DeleteNotificationConfiguration.description: Grants permission to delete the specified notification

DeletePolicy.name: DeletePolicy
DeletePolicy.description: Grants permission to delete the specified Auto Scaling policy

DeleteScheduledAction.name: DeleteScheduledAction
DeleteScheduledAction.description: Grants permission to delete the specified scheduled action

DeleteTags.name: DeleteTags
DeleteTags.description: Grants permission to delete the specified tags

DeleteWarmPool.name: DeleteWarmPool
DeleteWarmPool.description: Grants permission to delete the warm pool associated with the Auto Scaling group

DescribeAccountLimits.name: DescribeAccountLimits
DescribeAccountLimits.description: Grants permission to describe the current Auto Scaling resource limits for your AWS account

DescribeAccountSettings.name: DescribeAccountSettings
DescribeAccountSettings.description: Grants permission to describe the current Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling account settings for your account

DescribeAdjustmentTypes.name: DescribeAdjustmentTypes
DescribeAdjustmentTypes.description: Grants permission to describe the policy adjustment types for use with PutScalingPolicy

DescribeAutoScalingGroups.name: DescribeAutoScalingGroups
DescribeAutoScalingGroups.description: Grants permission to describe one or more Auto Scaling groups. If a list of names is not provided, the call describes all Auto Scaling groups

DescribeAutoScalingInstances.name: DescribeAutoScalingInstances
DescribeAutoScalingInstances.description: Grants permission to describe one or more Auto Scaling instances. If a list is not provided, the call describes all instances

DescribeAutoScalingNotificationTypes.name: DescribeAutoScalingNotificationTypes
DescribeAutoScalingNotificationTypes.description: Grants permission to describe the notification types that are supported by Auto Scaling

DescribeInstanceRefreshes.name: DescribeInstanceRefreshes
DescribeInstanceRefreshes.description: Grants permission to describe one or more instance refreshes for an Auto Scaling group

DescribeLaunchConfigurations.name: DescribeLaunchConfigurations
DescribeLaunchConfigurations.description: Grants permission to describe one or more launch configurations. If you omit the list of names, then the call describes all launch configurations

DescribeLifecycleHookTypes.name: DescribeLifecycleHookTypes
DescribeLifecycleHookTypes.description: Grants permission to describe the available types of lifecycle hooks

DescribeLifecycleHooks.name: DescribeLifecycleHooks
DescribeLifecycleHooks.description: Grants permission to describe the lifecycle hooks for the specified Auto Scaling group

DescribeLoadBalancerTargetGroups.name: DescribeLoadBalancerTargetGroups
DescribeLoadBalancerTargetGroups.description: Grants permission to describe the target groups for the specified Auto Scaling group

DescribeLoadBalancers.name: DescribeLoadBalancers
DescribeLoadBalancers.description: Grants permission to describe the load balancers for the specified Auto Scaling group

DescribeMetricCollectionTypes.name: DescribeMetricCollectionTypes
DescribeMetricCollectionTypes.description: Grants permission to describe the available CloudWatch metrics for Auto Scaling

DescribeNotificationConfigurations.name: DescribeNotificationConfigurations
DescribeNotificationConfigurations.description: Grants permission to describe the notification actions associated with the specified Auto Scaling group

DescribePolicies.name: DescribePolicies
DescribePolicies.description: Grants permission to describe the policies for the specified Auto Scaling group

DescribeScalingActivities.name: DescribeScalingActivities
DescribeScalingActivities.description: Grants permission to describe one or more scaling activities for the specified Auto Scaling group

DescribeScalingProcessTypes.name: DescribeScalingProcessTypes
DescribeScalingProcessTypes.description: Grants permission to describe the scaling process types for use with ResumeProcesses and SuspendProcesses

DescribeScheduledActions.name: DescribeScheduledActions
DescribeScheduledActions.description: Grants permission to describe the actions scheduled for your Auto Scaling group that haven't run

DescribeTags.name: DescribeTags
DescribeTags.description: Grants permission to describe the specified tags

DescribeTerminationPolicyTypes.name: DescribeTerminationPolicyTypes
DescribeTerminationPolicyTypes.description: Grants permission to describe the termination policies supported by Auto Scaling

DescribeTrafficSources.name: DescribeTrafficSources
DescribeTrafficSources.description: Grants permission to describe the target groups for the specified Auto Scaling group

DescribeWarmPool.name: DescribeWarmPool
DescribeWarmPool.description: Grants permission to describe the warm pool associated with the Auto Scaling group

DetachInstances.name: DetachInstances
DetachInstances.description: Grants permission to remove one or more instances from the specified Auto Scaling group

DetachLoadBalancerTargetGroups.name: DetachLoadBalancerTargetGroups
DetachLoadBalancerTargetGroups.description: Grants permission to detach one or more target groups from the specified Auto Scaling group

DetachLoadBalancers.name: DetachLoadBalancers
DetachLoadBalancers.description: Grants permission to remove one or more load balancers from the specified Auto Scaling group

DetachTrafficSources.name: DetachTrafficSources
DetachTrafficSources.description: Grants permission to detach one or more traffic sources from an Auto Scaling group

DisableMetricsCollection.name: DisableMetricsCollection
DisableMetricsCollection.description: Grants permission to disable monitoring of the specified metrics for the specified Auto Scaling group

EnableMetricsCollection.name: EnableMetricsCollection
EnableMetricsCollection.description: Grants permission to enable monitoring of the specified metrics for the specified Auto Scaling group

EnterStandby.name: EnterStandby
EnterStandby.description: Grants permission to move the specified instances into Standby mode

ExecutePolicy.name: ExecutePolicy
ExecutePolicy.description: Grants permission to execute the specified policy

ExitStandby.name: ExitStandby
ExitStandby.description: Grants permission to move the specified instances out of Standby mode

GetPredictiveScalingForecast.name: GetPredictiveScalingForecast
GetPredictiveScalingForecast.description: Grants permission to retrieve the forecast data for a predictive scaling policy

LaunchInstances.name: LaunchInstances
LaunchInstances.description: Grants permission to launch one or more EC2 instances in the specified Auto Scaling group

PutAccountSetting.name: PutAccountSetting
PutAccountSetting.description: Grants permission to modify an account setting for your account

PutLifecycleHook.name: PutLifecycleHook
PutLifecycleHook.description: Grants permission to create or update a lifecycle hook for the specified Auto Scaling Group

PutNotificationConfiguration.name: PutNotificationConfiguration
PutNotificationConfiguration.description: Grants permission to configure an Auto Scaling group to send notifications when specified events take place

PutScalingPolicy.name: PutScalingPolicy
PutScalingPolicy.description: Grants permission to create or update a policy for an Auto Scaling group

PutScheduledUpdateGroupAction.name: PutScheduledUpdateGroupAction
PutScheduledUpdateGroupAction.description: Grants permission to create or update a scheduled scaling action for an Auto Scaling group

PutWarmPool.name: PutWarmPool
PutWarmPool.description: Grants permission to create or update the warm pool associated with the specified Auto Scaling group

RecordLifecycleActionHeartbeat.name: RecordLifecycleActionHeartbeat
RecordLifecycleActionHeartbeat.description: Grants permission to record a heartbeat for the lifecycle action associated with the specified token or instance

ResumeProcesses.name: ResumeProcesses
ResumeProcesses.description: Grants permission to resume the specified suspended Auto Scaling processes, or all suspended process, for the specified Auto Scaling group

RollbackInstanceRefresh.name: RollbackInstanceRefresh
RollbackInstanceRefresh.description: Grants permission to rollback an instance refresh operation in progress

SetDesiredCapacity.name: SetDesiredCapacity
SetDesiredCapacity.description: Grants permission to set the size of the specified Auto Scaling group

SetInstanceHealth.name: SetInstanceHealth
SetInstanceHealth.description: Grants permission to set the health status of the specified instance

SetInstanceProtection.name: SetInstanceProtection
SetInstanceProtection.description: Grants permission to update the instance protection settings of the specified instances

StartInstanceRefresh.name: StartInstanceRefresh
StartInstanceRefresh.description: Grants permission to start a new instance refresh operation

SuspendProcesses.name: SuspendProcesses
SuspendProcesses.description: Grants permission to suspend the specified Auto Scaling processes, or all processes, for the specified Auto Scaling group

TerminateInstanceInAutoScalingGroup.name: TerminateInstanceInAutoScalingGroup
TerminateInstanceInAutoScalingGroup.description: Grants permission to terminate the specified instance and optionally adjust the desired group size

UpdateAutoScalingGroup.name: UpdateAutoScalingGroup
UpdateAutoScalingGroup.description: Grants permission to update the configuration for the specified Auto Scaling group

autoscaling:CapacityReservationIds.name: autoscaling:CapacityReservationIds
autoscaling:CapacityReservationIds.description: Filters access based on the Capacity Reservation IDs

autoscaling:CapacityReservationResourceG.name: autoscaling:CapacityReservationResourceGroupArns
autoscaling:CapacityReservationResourceG.description: Filters access based on the ARN of a Capacity Reservation resource group

autoscaling:ForceDelete.name: autoscaling:ForceDelete
autoscaling:ForceDelete.description: Filters access based on whether the force delete option is specified when deleting an Auto Scaling group

autoscaling:ImageId.name: autoscaling:ImageId
autoscaling:ImageId.description: Filters access based on the AMI ID for the launch configuration

autoscaling:InstanceType.name: autoscaling:InstanceType
autoscaling:InstanceType.description: Filters access based on the instance type for the launch configuration

autoscaling:InstanceTypes.name: autoscaling:InstanceTypes
autoscaling:InstanceTypes.description: Filters access based on the instance types present as overrides to a launch template for a mixed instances policy. Use it to qualify which instance types can be explicitly defined in the policy

autoscaling:LaunchConfigurationName.name: autoscaling:LaunchConfigurationName
autoscaling:LaunchConfigurationName.description: Filters access based on the name of a launch configuration

autoscaling:LaunchTemplateVersionSpecifi.name: autoscaling:LaunchTemplateVersionSpecified
autoscaling:LaunchTemplateVersionSpecifi.description: Filters access based on whether users can specify any version of a launch template or only the Latest or Default version

autoscaling:LoadBalancerNames.name: autoscaling:LoadBalancerNames
autoscaling:LoadBalancerNames.description: Filters access based on the name of the load balancer

autoscaling:MaxSize.name: autoscaling:MaxSize
autoscaling:MaxSize.description: Filters access based on the maximum scaling size in the request

autoscaling:MetadataHttpEndpoint.name: autoscaling:MetadataHttpEndpoint
autoscaling:MetadataHttpEndpoint.description: Filters access based on whether the HTTP endpoint is enabled for the instance metadata service

autoscaling:MetadataHttpPutResponseHopLi.name: autoscaling:MetadataHttpPutResponseHopLimit
autoscaling:MetadataHttpPutResponseHopLi.description: Filters access based on the allowed number of hops when calling the instance metadata service

autoscaling:MetadataHttpTokens.name: autoscaling:MetadataHttpTokens
autoscaling:MetadataHttpTokens.description: Filters access based on whether tokens are required when calling the instance metadata service (optional or required)

autoscaling:MinSize.name: autoscaling:MinSize
autoscaling:MinSize.description: Filters access based on the minimum scaling size in the request

autoscaling:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.name: autoscaling:ResourceTag/${TagKey}
autoscaling:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access based on the tags associated with the resource

autoscaling:SpotPrice.name: autoscaling:SpotPrice
autoscaling:SpotPrice.description: Filters access based on the price for Spot Instances for the launch configuration

autoscaling:TargetGroupARNs.name: autoscaling:TargetGroupARNs
autoscaling:TargetGroupARNs.description: Filters access based on the ARN of a target group

autoscaling:TrafficSourceIdentifiers.name: autoscaling:TrafficSourceIdentifiers
autoscaling:TrafficSourceIdentifiers.description: Filters access based on the identifiers of the traffic sources

autoscaling:VPCZoneIdentifiers.name: autoscaling:VPCZoneIdentifiers
autoscaling:VPCZoneIdentifiers.description: Filters access based on the identifier of a VPC zone

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.name: aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}
aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access based on the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.name: aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}
aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access based on the tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.name: aws:TagKeys
aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access based on the tag keys that are passed in the request
